scripts.build:wasm-st: cross-env RUSTFLAGS= wasm-pack build --target web -- --no-default-features --features app
scripts.build:wasm-mt: wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-parallel -- --no-default-features --features app,parallel -Z build-std=panic_abort,std
scripts.serve: npm run build && serve dist --config serve.json
